# hover-reveal

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:BEGIN — do not edit; regenerated by `./singularity build` -->

## Plugin reference

- Description: Hover/focus reveal for trailing affordances: useHoverReveal() + hoverRevealClass() couple opacity with pointer-events so a hidden control is never a live click-target (no invisible dead-zone over the blank space beside it).
- Web:
  - Uses: `primitives/css/ui-kit.cn`
  - Exports: Values: `hoverRevealClass`, `hoverRevealGroup`, `hoverRevealTarget`, `useHoverReveal`
- Cross-plugin:
  - Imported by: `active-data`, `apps/pages/page-tree`, `apps/sonata/library`, `apps/surface/floating`, `config_v2/settings`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/attachment`, `conversations/conversation-view/jsonl-viewer/unknown`, `layouts/miller`, `page/audio`, `page/bookmark`, `page/code-block`, `page/embed`, `page/file`, `page/image`, `page/video`, `primitives/css/row`, `primitives/data-table`, `primitives/data-view`, `primitives/data-view/gallery`, `primitives/text-editor/paste-images`, `tasks/task-description`, `tasks/task-draft-form`, `ui/tab-bar`, `ui/tab-bar/chip`, `ui/tab-bar/connected`, `ui/tab-bar/underline`

<!-- AUTOGENERATED:END -->
